name: Country Hopper
short_description: Delivery Doug drives around the world delivering boxes. Help him find the shortest route from one country to another. Collect pieces of beautiful Jigsaw puzzles and improve your geography knowledge along the way.
detailed_description:
Country Hopper exercises knowledge of geography. Find the shortest path from one country to another. The country hopping quests start small. You get to familiarize yourself with different countries and their neighbours by searching 2-3 hop routes. As you level up, the quests get more challenging with routes that need handful of hops. It's rewarding to know where exactly a country is on the planet, and not just hear its name on the news.

The game starts in Europe. After you solve enough quests with perfect score, you earn stars that you can use to unlock new continents.

While hopping around the countries you will collect pieces of jigsaw puzzles that will reveal beautiful paintings of the landmarks, culture and nature around the world.
